posts.raw_content:
I’m feeling happy and optimistic about performing well in the midterms, and 2028 especially.

We are basically playing with house money for the midterms. The incumbent almost never wins. If we win, that would be excellent as there is so much of Trump’s agenda that still needs to pass, especially the SAVE Act. But even if we lose it is expected and worst case is gridlock for 2 years. 

That being said we are in excellent position to maintain the house because of redistricting. Democrats are trending in the wrong direction and that is even before the war in Iran comes to an end. Prices are poised to fall. The economy is poised to grow bigly at the perfect time.

Democrats have -3 million cash on hand. Republicans have $125 million. Elon is a trillionaire and will probably end up doubling that number. 250th anniversary is going to hype up republicans and demoralize democrats. Our turnout is going to be remarkable.

I’m super gay. Might be gayer than Scott Pressler. I’m riding that big ol Trump Train and I’m not stopping for a gosh darn second!!
